components.name: Size=medium, Items=2, Solid=false
components.description: Changing the "checked" state of an individual item may require a manual reset of its effects for its stroke to work properly

components.name: Direction=top↑
components.description:
Adjust arrow horizontal position by changing horizontal padding in Auto Layout Panel on "arrow-position-scrubber" frame

To center the arrow, just hit align center on "arrow-position-scrubber" frame

components.name: Direction=top-left↖︎
components.description:
Adjust arrow horizontal position by changing horizontal padding in Auto Layout Panel on "arrow-position-scrubber" frame

To center the arrow, just hit align center on "arrow-position-scrubber" frame
